work_schedule.shift_note: On Amazon shift days Raju has very limited time. Even 5-10 quality applications is a great achievement. Do NOT pressure him with the full 25-job goal — be understanding and encouraging.
work_schedule.weekend_note: Saturdays and Sundays see much lower recruiter activity. Fewer responses are expected. Encourage quality over quantity and use the time to research companies or refine resumes.

personal_context: Raju is a recent MSc Data Science graduate from Roehampton University London. He is highly skilled in AI/ML engineering and is actively job hunting in the competitive London tech market. He works Amazon Associate night shifts to financially support himself while job hunting — which makes his dedication to applying 25 jobs per day even more impressive. He is ambitious, hardworking, and determined to land a role that matches his depth of expertise.
